title: P5-01 Cookie Consent signal module
acceptance_criteria: Detect known CMPs via DOM markers in crawl.cleanedHtml/renderedHtml AND via crawl.networkRequests/jsBundleUrls script domains (OneTrust, Cookiebot, Osano, Termly, Usercentrics, CookieYes, Didomi, Complianz, Klaro, Quantcast)
FAIL-CLOSED: if crawl.renderMode !== 'headless' (or renderedHtml absent), emit a single INFO 'cookie-consent signal not evaluated (no rendered DOM)' — never a negative finding

When rendered: if non-essential cookies present (crawl.cookies) and NO consent mechanism detected, emit a factual signal finding (no score, no '€20M fine' verdict language); if CMP detected emit INFO 'consent mechanism observed'
moduleId 'P5-01', category 'Privacy & Compliance'; explanation/impact are factual signals with regulation refs as context only; no attestation/verdict wording
Pure function over crawl data — NO new outbound network request
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
